Selected work

Results that are worth showing.

Six cases — two purpose-built CRM systems, and four digital marketing campaigns — showing both sides of the full acquisition pipeline.

CRM & Automation · Salesforce Build

Lead Capture & Routing System

Built after losing 30 warm real estate leads to zero CRM infrastructure. This system connects Meta Lead Ads to Salesforce, routes leads instantly, and triggers automated follow-up — so no lead ever goes cold again.

  • Custom Lead Object with Property Interest and Budget Range fields mapping Meta form data directly into Salesforce
  • Configured Web-to-Lead integration auto-tagging every submission as "Meta Lead Ads" source
  • Built a record-triggered Salesforce Flow: on lead arrival → auto-create follow-up task → notify sales rep instantly
  • Target response time reduced to under 5 minutes with zero manual steps in the pipeline
30 Leads that triggered the build
<5 min Target response time
100% Automated on capture
0 Manual steps

What was built

🎯
Custom Lead Object

Added Property Interest and Budget Range fields to capture real estate-specific data from every Meta form submission.

🔗
Web-to-Lead Integration

Configured Salesforce Web-to-Lead to receive Meta form submissions directly, with Lead Source auto-tagged as Meta Lead Ads.

⚡
Automated Response Flow

Record-triggered Salesforce Flow fires the moment a Meta lead lands — creating a follow-up task and notifying the sales rep instantly.

System in action

Lead record — Meta Lead Ads source + custom fields

Follow-up task auto-created on lead arrival

Salesforce Flow — trigger → task → email alert

Context: This system was built in response to a real failure at Rheel Estate — 30 warm leads generated from a Meta campaign that were never followed up because there was no infrastructure to handle them. Rather than moving on, I spent the following months learning the exact tools needed to ensure it never happens again. This is a working demo environment. The architecture is production-ready.

Lifecycle Marketing & Automation · HubSpot

Lead Lifecycle & Nurture System

Real estate buying timelines stretch from weeks to over a year. A single nurture sequence that exits after 14 days abandons exactly the leads who simply need more time. This system segments leads by buying intent at the point of capture, then routes each into a path built for how long they'll actually take to convert.

  • Built a custom "Buying Timeline" contact property capturing intent at capture — Immediately, 3-6 Months, 6-12 Months, Just Browsing
  • Created two active segmented lists — Hot and Nurture — auto-populating from the Buying Timeline field
  • Wrote and tested two live email templates: a Hot Lead inspection-booking email and a Nurture Day 0 welcome email, both with working personalisation tokens
  • Mapped the full 8-touchpoint lifecycle architecture, including the Workflow-tier automation logic needed for hands-off execution
  • Designed with no hard exit — leads who don't convert in 14 days roll into an ongoing monthly drip instead of dropping out
2 Segmentation Paths by Intent
8 Email Touchpoints Mapped
0 Leads Dropped After Day 14
∞ Drip Continues to Conversion
Routing logic
📱 Meta Instant Form
→
🏷️ Buying Timeline?

What was built

🏷️
Buying Timeline Property

Custom HubSpot contact property capturing intent at the point of capture — Immediately, 3-6 Months, 6-12 Months, Just Browsing.

📋
Two Active Segmented Lists

Hot leads and nurture leads auto-populate based on the Buying Timeline field — tested end to end with live form submissions.

✉️
Two Built Email Templates

Hot Lead inspection-booking email and Nurture Day 0 welcome email — both built, sent, and verified with working personalization tokens.

🗺️
Full Lifecycle Architecture

8-touchpoint system mapped end to end, including the Workflow-tier automation logic needed for full hands-off execution.

Full lifecycle architecture

Boxes built and tested live in this demo. The dashed section documents Workflow-tier automation logic — gated behind HubSpot's paid plans — designed correctly but not executable on the free tier.

System in action

Buying Timeline — custom segmentation property

Active lists — tested with live form submissions

Hot Lead email — inspection booking CTA

Nurture Day 0 — welcome email, token-tested

Design decision: Most nurture sequences are built for SaaS-length buying cycles — two to four weeks, then exit. Real estate doesn't work that way. This system was deliberately designed with no hard exit: leads who don't convert in the first 14 days roll into an ongoing monthly drip rather than dropping out of the pipeline. The goal was to design a system that never repeats the original failure — a lead going quiet simply because nobody built the infrastructure to keep following up.

Real Estate · Full-Funnel Acquisition

Rheel Estate Ltd

A fast-growing Nigerian real estate firm needed a full digital marketing engine — from paid lead generation to CRM automation — to scale qualified property enquiries while cutting acquisition costs.

  • Built a Zapier-powered CRM pipeline automating lead follow-ups, cutting response time from 24 hours to 47 minutes
  • Ran hyper-localised Meta lead gen campaigns leveraging Abuja buyer psychology — averaging 30 qualified leads/month
  • Replaced traditional landing pages with a WhatsApp-first capture flow, driving a 22% conversion rate
  • Ran Google Search Ads achieving a 27.27% CTR on key campaigns
  • Managed Google Business Profile optimisation, driving 64+ monthly interactions including calls (+200%) and direction requests (+33%)
  • Led MailerLite email campaigns for nurturing and re-engagement of prospects

Governance · Influencer Campaign

Federal Ministry of Water Resources

The #RevisedWaterBillNG needed public trust. The campaign had to sensitise Nigerians, debunk misinformation, and communicate real benefits — at scale.

  • Identified key influencers aligned with the target civic audience
  • Negotiated and drew up individual contracts with each influencer
  • Developed full campaign strategy, week-by-week content plan, and per-influencer briefs
  • Managed campaign budget from allocation through to delivery
  • Ran brand monitoring across Twitter to track sentiment and correct misinformation in real time

About

Platform thinking with business awareness.

I'm Alexander Ogunnusi — a Digital Marketing Manager based in Lagos, Nigeria. For the past 5 years I've helped brands across 8 industries build real presence online and convert that presence into measurable business outcomes.

Currently at Rheel Estate Ltd, I run the full acquisition funnel — from hyper-localised Meta campaigns and Google Search Ads to Zapier-powered CRM automation that cut response times from 24 hours to 47 minutes. Recent results include a 140% jump in lead generation and a 65% reduction in customer acquisition costs.

I'm also a Certified Salesforce Platform Administrator, which gives me deep, transferable CRM expertise across HubSpot, Zoho, MailerLite, and any pipeline tooling a team runs. What I care about is results that can be pointed at — not impressions for their own sake, but growth that translates into qualified leads, orders, and long-term brand equity.

  • Salesforce CRM Administration & Flow Automation
  • Lead Capture, Routing & Nurture System Design
  • HubSpot & Zoho Pipeline Architecture
  • Meta & Google Performance Campaigns
  • Multi-platform Social Media Management
  • Data-Driven Reporting & Analytics
